demographics.living_situation: resident in a residential aged care facility, cared for by nursing staff

contact_nok.relationship: facility nursing staff present at the bedside

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My leg ulcer has suddenly become agonizing today, it smells terrible, and the bandage is soaked with green fluid.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The long-standing sore on my ankle has changed a lot in the last half a day — much more pain, a bad smell, and heavy discharge — and the nurses wanted a doctor to look at it.

symptom_narrative.onset: the change came on over about the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: the sore itself has been there and slow to heal for over a month; the sudden worsening is today
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, throbbing, severe pain in the ankle sore, with a strong bad smell and thick green fluid soaking the dressing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is now so bad that even changing the dressing is unbearable
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the sore on the inner side of my left ankle
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it flared this morning and not settling
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far; the usual paracetamol is not touching it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: letting the leg hang down and any touch to the dressing
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the skin around the sore looks redder and feels warm, and the nurses say I feel a bit hot
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the ulcer has needed regular dressings at the facility but has never suddenly hurt or smelt like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: staying in bed because standing or letting the leg down is too painful

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a long-standing sore (leg ulcer) on the inner left ankle that has been slow to heal for more than four weeks
past_medical_history.how_managed: regular wound dressings by the facility nursing staff

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: poor circulation in the legs with old brown staining of the skin around the ankles
past_medical_history.how_managed: leg care and dressings at the facility

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: one gram, up to four times a day

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: elderly resident of an aged care facility, largely bedbound today because of the leg pain; nursing staff present and involved in care

objective_data_offered.value: nursing staff say her temperature has come up to about 37.8 degrees today
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: facility-staff-reported reading, not a clinician-verified observation set

objective_data_offered.value: on the video the sore on the inner ankle looks like a large open wound with a green-stained soaked dressing, and the skin around it looks red and puffy
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view only; depth, wound bed and the true extent of the surrounding redness cannot be judged on video

objective_data_offered.value: nursing staff report a strong offensive smell from the wound, that the dressing is soaked through with thick green fluid, and that she winces and will not move the leg
nursing staff say she looks tired and flushed but is talking normally and knows where she is
